landing.intro: This site is for Saurabh Dada and his shishyas to coordinate Gurupaurnima 2026 — which night suits each of us, what we'd like to perform, and who'll be there. Three small things.
landing.pickAfterSignin: You'll pick the one(s) that suit you after signing in.
landing.how.step1.title: Sign up with a code
landing.how.step1.body: Shishyas use today's 6-digit code (any admin shares it on request). Audience uses an invite code from a verified shishya or the guru. No code? Reach out to an admin from the signup screen.
landing.how.step2.title: Tell us which night suits you
landing.how.step2.body: Three possible dates. Pick one or more, or let us know none of them work.
landing.how.step3.title: If you're performing, share your piece
landing.how.step3.body: The composition, the scale, and what you'll need on stage. So we don't pick the same piece twice.
landing.access.shishya.title: A student of Saurabh Dada
landing.access.shishya.body: You'll need today's 6-digit shishya code. It changes each day at midnight (IST). Ask any admin on WhatsApp and they'll share it.
landing.access.audience.title: Coming to listen
landing.access.audience.body: You'll need a 6-character invite code from a verified shishya or the guru. Codes last 24 hours. Once you're in, you'll see the concert details.
landing.footnoteMade: Made by shishyas, for the program.
landing.footnoteRaag: Choose a raag from the menu for a different mood.
signup.role.intro: Both paths need a small code. Pick whichever describes you.
signup.role.shishyaBody: You'll need today's shishya code, shared by an admin.
signup.role.audienceBody: You'll need an invite code from a shishya or the guru.
signup.code.intro.shishya: It's a 6-digit number that changes every day at midnight IST. Any admin can share it.
signup.code.intro.audience: It's a 6-character code from someone who invited you. Each code is good for 24 hours.
signup.code.noCodeBody: Reach out to {name} — they'll share one with you.
signup.code.invalidShishya: That doesn't look like today's code
signup.code.invalidInvite: Invite code is invalid or has expired
signup.form.intro: We'll send a one-time link to your email to verify it's really you.
signup.form.passwordShort: Password should be at least 8 characters
signup.form.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
signup.sent.body: A confirmation link is on its way to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.
signup.profile.intro.shishya: So your guru and the other shishyas can recognise you.
signup.profile.intro.audience: Once you're in, you'll see the concert details.
forgot.sentBody: We sent a link to {email}. Open it to choose a new password.
app.home.welcomeIntro: Welcome back. Here's where things stand for you and the program.
app.home.step1: Tell us which night suits you
poll.intro: Tick every date that works. If none of these suit, mark that instead. You can come back and change this any time.
poll.guruIntro: Here's where the gathering is leaning. The shishyas' votes appear below.
poll.cantAttend: I can't attend any of these
poll.pickOneOrNone: Pick at least one date, or mark "Can't attend".
perf.intro: So we don't pick the same piece twice. Tap any entry to see the artist's details.
perf.noneYet: No one has pledged a piece yet.
perf.finaliseWithGuru: Need to finalise with Saurabh Dada?
perf.mineH1: What will you sing or play?
perf.mineIntro: You can come back and change this any time.
perf.notesPlaceholder: A line about the piece, taal, tempo…
shishyas.intro: Tap anyone to see details, WhatsApp them, or place a call.
profile.askIntro: Send a request and an admin will accept, reject, or hold it.
profile.askNotVerifiedAddendum: You currently aren't verified — until you are, you can't generate invite codes or be made admin.
profile.reasonPlaceholder: A short line for the admin
profile.requestSent: Request sent — admins will see it
invite.intro: Generate a 6-character code and share it with someone you'd like to bring as audience. Each code is good for 24 hours and can be used by multiple people.
invite.notVerifiedBody: Only verified shishyas (and the guru) can generate invite codes. Ask an admin to verify you, or send a request now.
invite.shareNote: Share it via WhatsApp. Whoever signs up with it joins as audience; you'll be listed as their inviter.
admin.intro: Today's shishya code, requests waiting on you, and recent invites at a glance.
admin.todayNote: Rotates at 00:00 IST. Yesterday's code is also accepted for a few hours after midnight as a grace window. Share it via WhatsApp or wherever convenient — anyone with the code can sign up as a shishya today.
admin.noInvites: No invites have been generated yet.
admin.reqToShishya: asks to be reclassified as shishya
admin.reqToAudience: asks to be reclassified as audience
event.intro: An evening of compositions by his shishyas. Final details land closer to the date — bookmark this page.
event.datesNote: One will be picked based on the poll of shishyas.
event.venueNote: To be finalised. Will be in Pune.
event.formatNote: Brief introduction by the guru, followed by performances, closing remarks.
event.entryNote: Audience joins via an invite code from a verified shishya or the guru.
event.footer: The blanks above will fill in once they're confirmed. We'll let you know in the activity feed when something changes.
whatsapp.welcomeBody: Rehearsal threads, last-minute updates, and Saurabh Dada's voice notes live here.
whatsapp.notReadyBody: The WhatsApp group is shared only with verified shishyas. Once Saurabh Dada or a senior shishya marks you verified, this page opens up.
activity.intro: Visible to gurus & admin shishyas only. Most recent first.
activity.action.poll.update.admin: edited date picks on behalf of someone
activity.action.request.raise.change_to_: asked to be reclassified as shishya
asked to be reclassified as audience
authError.otp.title: This link has set with the sun.
authError.otp.body: Magic links last only a short while for safety. Request a fresh one — we'll send it right away.
authError.denied.title: That didn't open.
authError.denied.body: The link couldn't be honoured. It may have been used already, or expired. Try again.
authError.unknown.title: Something didn't go through.
authError.unknown.body: We couldn't complete that sign-in. Try once more, or sign in with your password.
